meaning: n.鍋滄琛岃繘鍙峰織,绾㈣壊灏剧伅
examples: This rural outpost, 400 miles northeast of Helena, has one stoplight.
Holly waited at a stoplight, impatient for the signal to change.
A buddy of mine was in his car, stopped at a stoplight, staring at a hot woman walking through the crosswalk.
What about waiting for a long stoplight or sitting at a restaurant counter?
Riding to work on her clunky Vespa, she heard the roar of a motorcycle that pulled alongside her at a stoplight.
